intake.harness_policy: add or identify characterization before changing data-loading boundaries
intake.stop_condition: stop when selected slice needs wider product decisions, validation fails twice, scope expands beyond one concept, or current tranche is implemented and reviewed

focus_areas.name: Vite chunk boundaries
focus_areas.evidence: dist/assets/useTimelineNow-*.js fell from about 879.6 kB minified / 109.7 kB gzip to about 130.1 kB / 24.9 kB gzip.
focus_areas.next: C1 implemented; no current Vite >500 kB warning after measurement.

focus_areas.name: Data-loading architecture seams
focus_areas.evidence: src/domain/dzone.ts now loads full D-Zone season archives on demand; catalogRepository.ts and searchRepository.ts statically import all public-v3 scopes.
focus_areas.next: Leave public-v3 catalog/search for a separate branch because remaining chunk is below warning threshold and broader risk.

focus_areas.name: React route/lazy boundaries
focus_areas.evidence: Database routes share one lazy DatabasePage and browse registry imports all entity browse views.
focus_areas.next: Queue after data-loading seams unless measurements show higher user impact.

focus_areas.name: TypeScript trust boundaries
focus_areas.evidence: Candidate seams parse JSON at module load; moving loaders must preserve parsed types and validation ownership.

focus_areas.name: Dependency/manual chunk strategy
focus_areas.evidence: No manual chunk strategy exists in vite.config.ts; scouts recommend fixing boundaries before manual chunks.
focus_areas.next: Do not touch unless boundary fixes fail or dependency review says otherwise.

candidates.title: Split D-Zone current summary from full archive data
candidates.evidence: useTimelineNow chunk contained all src/data/dzone/seasons/*.json because dzone.ts used an eager glob and both current and archive routes imported it.
candidates.next: Implemented with lazy archive loaders and page-level async loading.

candidates.title: Split public-v3 catalog repository by scope
candidates.evidence: catalogRepository.ts statically imports all 11 catalog JSON files; any scope use can pull all catalogs.
candidates.next: Separate future slice only; current chunk is about 486.0 kB minified / 58.4 kB gzip and below warning threshold.

candidates.title: Split public search indexes or lazy Fuse/search data
candidates.evidence: Search repository statically imports every search JSON and public-search.ts imports Fuse.

candidates.title: Split database browse registry by entity
candidates.evidence: One lazy DatabasePage imports all entity browse/data infrastructure.

candidates.title: Lazy-load shared detail modal host on first open outside database
candidates.evidence: Non-database routes import database detail orchestration even if details are never opened.
candidates.next: Queue if route chunks remain chunky after data seams.

candidates.title: Measure broad recordRepository URL map
candidates.evidence: URL/no-inline glob avoids raw record payload, but generated map may still cost chunk bytes.
candidates.next: Measurement task only; no implementation until evidence.

candidates.title: React icons duplication
candidates.evidence: Multiple static icon imports across routes; likely minor after tree-shaking.
candidates.next: Do not touch without analyzer evidence.

maintenance.title: Build chunk measurement script
maintenance.next: Consider only after one implementation slice proves recurring measurement value.

tasks.title: Audit bundle chunk sources
tasks.expected_output: Ranked candidates with evidence, concept blast radius, validation ideas, and maintenance candidates.

evidence: Local Vite build output measured useTimelineNow at about 879.6 kB minified / 109.7 kB gzip.
Scout 019e3d8c-725b-7a42-bfaa-8c5dac330069 reported public-v3 catalog/search and data/dependency findings.

tasks.title: Judge D-Zone archive chunk split
tasks.expected_output: One bounded Worker slice proposal for C1 with invariants, allowed files, characterization needs, validation, rollback, and before/after measurement plan.

behavior_preserved: Current D-Zone page renders the active season.
History page supports deep-linked season selection and browser interactions.
Zod validation remains at the JSON import boundary for loaded season archives.
measurement: Before: useTimelineNow about 879.6 kB minified / 109.7 kB gzip.
After: useTimelineNow about 130.1 kB minified / 24.9 kB gzip.
D-Zone season archives now emit as small on-demand chunks, generally about 7-17 kB minified each.
No Vite >500 kB chunk warning remained in the measured build.
validation: npm run test -- src/domain/dzone.test.ts src/pages/DZonePage.test.tsx src/pages/DZoneHistoryPage.test.tsx src/pages/d-zone/d-zone-view-model.test.ts src/pages/d-zone/d-zone-countdown.test.ts src/pages/timeline/TimelinePage.test.tsx
receipt.follow_up: Do not fold the broader public-v3 catalog/search split into this tranche; it is below the warning threshold and has wider risk.

final_audit.summary: D-Zone archive chunk boundary implemented; broader public-v3 candidates intentionally left queued for separate future work.
open_items: C2 public-v3 catalog repository scope split
